executiveSummary.text: Home Depot is the dominant US home improvement retailer with unrivalled scale and a high-quality Pro-customer ecosystem. Q4 2025 results beat on earnings but missed on sales as the US housing market remains stalled — big-ticket categories (kitchens, bathrooms, major renovations) are weak and homeowners are deferring projects waiting for mortgage rate relief. Despite near-term pressure, 39 analysts maintain a Strong Buy / Moderate Buy consensus with an average price target of $414, implying approximately 23% upside from current levels. The strategic pivot toward trade professionals (Pro Xtra, supply house formats) and ongoing dividend growth underpin the bull case. At 23x P/E on ~$15 EPS with a 2.4% dividend yield, the risk-reward is attractive for a cyclically-adjusted entry — SPECULATIVE BUY with conviction tempered by uncertain US housing cycle timing.
